name: Azure Virtual Network Device Modified or Deleted
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform

when the event matches Operation Name (custom) is any of [MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKINTERFACES/TAPCONFIGURATIONS/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKINTERFACES/TAPCONFIGURATIONS/DELETE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKINTERFACES/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKINTERFACES/JOIN/ACTION or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKINTERFACES/DELETE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKVIRTUALAPPLIANCES/DELETE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKVIRTUALAPPLIANCES/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/VIRTUALHUBS/DELETE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/VIRTUALHUBS/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/VIRTUALROUTERS/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/VIRTUALROUTERS/DELETE]
TD_list: APPLY Azure Virtual Network Device Modified or Deleted on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform

AND when the event matches Operation Name (custom) is any of [MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKINTERFACES/TAPCONFIGURATIONS/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKINTERFACES/TAPCONFIGURATIONS/DELETE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKINTERFACES/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKINTERFACES/JOIN/ACTION or  MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKINTERFACES/DELETE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKVIRTUALAPPLIANCES/DELETE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/NETWORKVIRTUALAPPLIANCES/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/VIRTUALHUBS/DELETE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/VIRTUALHUBS/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/VIRTUALROUTERS/WRITE or MICROSOFT.NETWORK/VIRTUALROUTERS/DELETE]
RED_list: Event name: Azure Firewall Rule Configuration Modified or Deleted

Event description: Identifies when a virtual network device is being modified or deleted.
This can be a network interface, network virtual appliance, virtual hub, or virtual router.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
Include detected events by "Username" from this point forward, in the offense, for 300 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
